# GameCenterMatchmakingQueueCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.ExperimentRuleSet.Data

**Object**

The data structure of the request body for an experimental rule set.

## Declaration

```swift
object GameCenterMatchmakingQueueCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.ExperimentRuleSet.Data
```

## Objects

- **GameCenterMatchmakingQueueCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.ExperimentRuleSet**: An experimental rule set for testing this queue.
- **GameCenterMatchmakingQueueCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.RuleSet**: The rule set associated with the queue.
